mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ws.总磅单编号 AS slipId, ws.总磅单号 AS slipCode, ws.日期 AS slipDate, ws.车号 AS licensePlate, MAX(do.驾驶员姓名) AS driverName, ws.净重 AS netWeight, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT do.运输单号 SEPARATOR ',') AS dispatchCodesStr, ws.二次过秤时间 AS completionTime, COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(tc.合同单号), MAX(s.合同单号)) AS contractCode, MAX(s.结算单单号) AS relatedSettlementNo, CASE WHEN MAX(s.结算单编号) IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isSettled FROM WEIGHING_SLIP ws INNER JOIN WEIGHING_SLIP_DISPATCH wsd ON ws.总磅单编号 = wsd.总磅单编号 INNER JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do ON wsd.运输单号 = do.运输单号 LEFT JOIN VEHICLE v ON do.车辆编号 = v.车辆编号 LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_CONTRACT_VEHICLE tcv ON v.车辆编号 = tcv.车辆编号 LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_CONTRACT tc ON tcv.合同编号 = tc.合同编号 AND tc.是否删除 = 0 LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER_NOTICE don ON do.运输单号 = don.运输单号 LEFT JOIN OTS_SLIP_RELATION osr ON ws.总磅单编号 = osr.总磅单编号 LEFT JOIN OUTSOURCE_TRANSPORT_SETTLEMENT s ON osr.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 AND s.是否删除 = 0 WHERE ws.状态 = '已细分'
AND (ws.车号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR do.驾驶员姓名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR ws.总磅单号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND s.结算单编号 IS NULL
GROUP BY ws.总磅单编号, ws.总磅单号, ws.日期, ws.车号, ws.净重, ws.二次过秤时间 ) AS t WHERE 1=1
AND contractCode = #{contractCode}
AND contractCode IS NULL
ORDER BY slipDate DESC, completionTime DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ws.总磅单编号) FROM WEIGHING_SLIP ws INNER JOIN WEIGHING_SLIP_DISPATCH wsd ON ws.总磅单编号 = wsd.总磅单编号 INNER JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do ON wsd.运输单号 = do.运输单号 LEFT JOIN VEHICLE v ON do.车辆编号 = v.车辆编号 LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_CONTRACT_VEHICLE tcv ON v.车辆编号 = tcv.车辆编号 LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_CONTRACT tc ON tcv.合同编号 = tc.合同编号 AND tc.是否删除 = 0 LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER_NOTICE don ON do.运输单号 = don.运输单号
LEFT JOIN OTS_SLIP_RELATION osr ON ws.总磅单编号 = osr.总磅单编号 LEFT JOIN OUTSOURCE_TRANSPORT_SETTLEMENT s ON osr.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 AND s.是否删除 = 0 WHERE ws.状态 = '已细分'
AND (tc.合同单号 = #{contractCode} OR s.合同单号 = #{contractCode})
AND (ws.车号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR do.驾驶员姓名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR ws.总磅单号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND tc.合同单号 IS NULL AND s.合同单号 IS NULL
AND s.结算单编号 IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM OUTSOURCE_TRANSPORT_SETTLEMENT WHERE 是否删除 = 0 AND 合同编号 IS NULL AND 合同单号 IS NOT NULL

SELECT s.结算单编号 AS settlementId, s.结算单单号 AS settlementNo, s.合同编号 AS contractId, s.合同单号 AS contractNo, s.承运方名称 AS carrierName, s.联系人 AS contactPerson, s.联系电话 AS contactPhone, s.银行名称 AS bankName, s.银行卡号 AS cardNumber, s.账户名称 AS accountName, s.结算周期起 AS settlementPeriodStart, s.结算周期止 AS settlementPeriodEnd, s.结算方式 AS settlementMethod, s.计量单位 AS unit, s.结算数量 AS settlementQuantity, s.结算单价 AS settlementPrice, s.结算金额 AS settlementAmount, s.已付金额 AS paidAmount, s.状态 AS status, s.审核意见 AS auditOpinion, s.审核人编码 AS auditorId, s.审核人姓名 AS auditorName, s.审核时间 AS auditTime, s.付款方向 AS paymentDirection, s.备注 AS remark, s.创建人编码 AS creatorId, s.创建人姓名 AS creatorName, s.创建时间 AS createTime, s.更新时间 AS updateTime, s.更新人编码 AS updaterId, s.是否锁定 AS locked, s.锁定时间 AS lockTime, s.锁定人编码 AS lockUserId, s.锁定原因 AS lockReason, s.是否删除 AS deleted, s.version AS version FROM OUTSOURCE_TRANSPORT_SETTLEMENT s WHERE s.是否删除 = 0 AND s.结算单编号 = #{settlementId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM OUTSOURCE_TRANSPORT_SETTLEMENT WHERE 是否删除 = 0 AND 状态 = #{status}
